Place your website images in this folder with the following names:

  hero.jpg        — Hero section background (factory/industrial)
  factory.jpg     — About Us section factory photo
  steel.jpg       — Industries section steel plant photo
  director1.jpg   — Prateek Agrawal photo
  director2.jpg   — Praveer Agrawal photo
  director3.jpg   — Niket Agrawal photo

All images fall back to Pexels stock photos if the local file is missing.
Recommended size: 1280x720px or larger for full-width images; 400x400px for director photos.
